Version 0.4.13 • MIT License

# CodeGraphContext

A powerful CLI toolkit & MCP server that indexes local code into a

knowledge graph for AI assistants

pip install codegraphcontext

[GitHub](https://github.com/CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext) [Docs](https://codegraphcontext.github.io/)

3610 GitHub Stars

649 Forks

Last month downloads: 30,891+

## See CodeGraphContext in Action

Watch how CodeGraphContext transforms complex codebases into interactive knowledge graphs.

Introducing CodeGraphContext- A Graphical Context of your Codebase for your LLMs - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[Introducing CodeGraphContext- A Graphical Context of your Codebase for your LLMs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KYYSdxhg1xU) [Shashank Shekhar Singh](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCK_hQ7kgUdiA4z14cD3bxlQ)

![thumbnail-image](https://yt3.ggpht.com/ytc/AIdro_kN0vHjIDhTA7B0t2l-8jw4du0Fp3Q4NWDxREtZ0wG6prM4O5dykKEJAxt14lhBl9HMMQ=s68-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj)

Shashank Shekhar Singh31 subscribers

[Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KYYSdxhg1xU)

### Interactive Visualizations

![Complete Code Graph](https://cgc.codes/assets/graph-total-D1fBAugo.png)

Full Overview

#### Complete Code Graph

All components and relationships between code elements.

![Function Call Analysis](https://cgc.codes/assets/function-calls-BtRHrqa2.png)

Call Chains

#### Function Call Analysis

Direct and indirect function calls across directories.

![Project Hierarchy](https://cgc.codes/assets/hierarchy-DGADo0YT.png)

File Structure

#### Project Hierarchy

Hierarchical structure of files and dependencies.

## Why CodeGraphContext?

Experience the next generation of AI-powered code understanding with graph-based intelligence

| Feature | GitHub Copilot | Cursor | CodeGraphContext |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Code Completion | ✓Strong | ✓Strong | ✓Strong |
| Refactoring Suggestions | ⚠Limited to context length | ⚠Limited to context length | ✓Via dependency tracing |
| Codebase Understanding | ✕Limited | ⚠Partial (local context) | ✓Deep graph-based |
| Call Graph & Imports | ✕No | ✕No | ✓Direct + Multi-hops |
| Cross-File Tracing | ✕Very low | ⚠Some | ✓Complete code |
| LLM Explainability | ✕Low | ⚠Hallucinate | ✓Extremely good |
| Performance on Large Codebases | ✕Slows with size | ✕Slows with size | ✓Scales with graph DB |
| Extensible to Multiple Languages | ✓Strong | ✓Strong | ⚠Work-in-progress |
| Set-up Time for new code | ✓Low | ✕Slows with size | ✕Slows with size |

Experience the power of graph-based code understanding

## Powerful Features

Transform your codebase into an intelligent knowledge graph that AI assistants can understand and navigate

### Code Indexing

Analyzes code and builds a comprehensive knowledge graph of its components, relationships, and dependencies.

### Relationship Analysis

Query for callers, callees, class hierarchies, and complex code relationships through natural language.

### Live Updates

Watches local files for changes and automatically updates the graph in real-time as you code.

### Interactive Setup

User-friendly command-line wizard for easy setup. FalkorDB Lite is default (Unix and WSL), with Neo4j available via Docker or native installation.

## Get Started in Minutes

### Understanding CodeGraphContext Modes

### CLI Toolkit (Standalone)

Index and analyze codebases directly from your terminal. Perfect for developers who want direct control via CLI commands.

### MCP Server (AI-Powered)

Connect to AI IDEs (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude, etc.). Let AI agents query your codebase using natural language. Perfect for AI-assisted development workflows.

### Installation (Both Modes)

```
$ pip install codegraphcontext
```

### Database Setup Options

FalkorDB Lite is default (Unix). For Neo4j, the wizard supports multiple configurations:

#### Docker (Recommended)

Automated Neo4j setup using Docker containers.

#### Linux Binary

Direct installation on Debian-based systems.

#### Hosted Database

Connect to Neo4j AuraDB or an existing instance.

### For CLI Toolkit Mode

### Start using immediately with CLI commands:

### Index your current directory

```
cgc index .
```

### List all indexed repositories

```
cgc list
```

### See all commands

```
cgc help
```

Ex:

```
cgc analyze callers my_function
```

[See the full CLI Commands Guide for all available commands and usage scenarios.](https://codegraphcontext.github.io/cli/)

### For MCP Server Mode

### Configure your AI assistant to use CodeGraphContext:

### Run the MCP setup wizard to configure:

```
cgc mcp setup
```

### Launch the MCP server:

```
cgc mcp start
```

[Now interact with your codebase through your AI assistant using natural language! See full cookbook.](https://codegraphcontext.github.io/cookbook/)

Bundle Registry

## Natural Language Interface

Interact with your code graph using plain English. No complex queries or syntax to learn.

Indexing

### Add Projects to Graph

"Please index the code in the \`/path/to/my-project\` directory."

"Add the project at \`~/dev/my-app\` to the code graph."

Analysis

### Code Relationships

"Show me all functions that call \`process\_data()\`"

"Find the class hierarchy for \`BaseProcessor\`"

Monitoring

### Live Updates

"Watch the \`/project\` directory for changes."

"Keep the graph updated for my active development."

Insights

### Code Quality

"Find dead code in my project"

"Show the most complex functions by cyclomatic complexity"

### Ready to enhance your AI assistant?

Start building intelligent code understanding today with CodeGraphContext.

`$ pip install codegraphcontext`

## MCP Tool Cookbook

Practical examples and patterns for using CodeGraphContext with AI assistants. Copy the JSON arguments and use them directly with your MCP-enabled AI tools.

Basic NavigationBasicCode AnalysisAnalysisAdvanced QueriesAdvanced

### Basic Navigation & Discovery

Essential queries for exploring and understanding your codebase structure.

### Find all definitions of a function

Find all definitions of the 'helper' function.

analyze\_code\_relationships

### Find all calls to a specific function

Find all calls to the 'helper' function.

analyze\_code\_relationships

### Find what a function calls

What functions are called inside the 'foo' function?

analyze\_code\_relationships

### Find all imports of a module

Where is the 'math' module imported?

analyze\_code\_relationships

#### Want to contribute more examples?

Help expand this cookbook with your own patterns and use cases.

[View Full Cookbook on GitHub](https://github.com/CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext/blob/main/docs/docs/cookbook.md)
